chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-108 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozear, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sawan Khan Jagirani, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner will challenge the promotion of respondent No.7 at the proper forum; therefore, under instructions, he does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of, leaving the petitioner at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance, if permitted under the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
